Government Memorandum, No: - Divyang - 2026 / P.No.84 / E-1608135 / Work-9
Date: 28th March, 2026
Reference: - 1. Government Circular No. Divyang - 2022 / P.S. No.10 / D. C. 2, D. 13th September, 2022.
2. Department No. Disability - 2024 / P.No.135 / DC-2, dated 27th September, 2023.
3. Letter dated 04.12.2025 (1580638) from Commissioner, Divyang Welfare, Pune.

Memorandum: - Regarding the prescribed procedure to be followed before payment of salary and non-salaried dues of teachers / non-teaching staff in Special Government Schools / Workshops for Persons with Disabilities, Reference No. The directions have been issued vide Government Circular No.1 dated 13th September, 2022 in Reference No. Instructions have been issued for scrutiny and submission of proposals as per the Scrutiny List prescribed vide letter dated 27.09.2023.

2. Accordingly, the Department received the Model Rural Women's Board Takli Dhokeshwar Operated Residential Matimand Vidyalaya Takli Dhokeshwar Ta from the Commissioner, Divyang Kalyan, Pune. Funds are being disbursed as follows for grant-in-aid (Programme), 31-Auxiliary Grants-in-aid (Non-Pay) to Non-Governmental Organizations working for persons belonging to the category of Matimand as per the Non-Payment Proposal of the School, Parner G. Ahilyanagar.

para_trans: The Commissioner, Commissionerate of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Maharashtra State, Pune will be the controlling officer to control the expenditure of the said fund. While disbursing the said funds, ensure that the proposal for non-salaried grants is sound.
Only then should the process of disbursing funds to the respective activities be carried out.

4. Proceedings for disbursement of funds by verifying that the penalty is applicable to the activity concerned or how and if applicable, the penalty has been imposed as per Section No. 5, Auxiliary Grants, Part-I, Roll No. 77 (nine) of the School Code.
should be done.
The Controlling Officer shall have control over the expenditure of funds and utilities in section 4 of the aforesaid statement.
The funds should be disbursed subject to submission of certificates, statement of expenditure and utilization certificate to the government without fail within 1 month.
6. Maharashtra Budget Manual, School Code and Fiscal while the Controller General of Expenditure.

The guidelines and norms in force and issued by the Planning Department, Finance Department as well as this Department from time to time, the delegations of financial powers as well as the instructions given from time to time are mentioned in the Rights Manual.
Follow strictly.
7. Funds / grants may not be spent for any purpose other than the purpose for which they are sanctioned. As well as other
Funds cannot be diverted to the head of the account.
The memorandum was made available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra, www.maharashtra.gov.in.
